message.content:
I need to redesign the SidebarOpinions component to match the visual style of the OpinionViewer component. Here's the context:

## Current SidebarOpinions Design (what needs to change)
- File: C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SidebarOpinions\SidebarOpinions.jsx
- Uses chat-bubble style with light blue (#E3F2FD) backgrounds and pseudo-element circles for bubble tails
- Profile image and username are in a separate container to the right of content
- Reply button is inline with the opinion content
- "See more" button for pagination
- Has a "signal-container" header with quote and "Write opinions" button

## OpinionViewer Design (the target style)
- File: C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SidebarOpinions\opinionViewer.jsx
- Modern card design using CSS variables (var(--bg-card), var(--border-card), etc.)
- User row at top: avatar (32px circle) + username + dot separator + date
- Opinion body uses serif font (var(--font-serif)) and var(--text-body) color
- Meta bar with reply pill using sage green accent (var(--accent-sage))
- Reply input row with small avatar + contenteditable input
- Cancel/Submit buttons with AnimatePresence
- Clean, minimal aesthetic

## CSS Structure
- All styles in sidebarOpinions.css (977 lines)
- SidebarOpinions uses classes like: sidebar-opinions-cards, opinions-content, sidebar-opinions-profile-container, sidebaropinion-reply-button
- OpinionViewer uses classes with "ov-" prefix: ov-card, ov-user-row, ov-avatar, ov-body, ov-meta-bar, ov-reply-pill
- Global CSS variables defined in index.css with light/dark theme support

## Data available in SidebarOpinions opinions map
Each opinion item has: id, opinion (text), user_id, users.image_url, users.name
No created_at date is available in the sidebar data (getOpinions API call)
No reply_count available in sidebar data

## Requirements
- Redesign the opinion cards in SidebarOpinions to visually match the OpinionViewer style
- Keep the "signal-container" header section (quote + write button) 
- Keep the "See more" pagination button
- Adapt the card layout: user avatar + name at top, opinion body below, reply button in a meta bar
- Use the same CSS variables and design tokens as OpinionViewer
- Keep existing click handlers and functionality intact
- The sidebar is a compact view, so sizes may be slightly smaller than the full OpinionViewer
- Need to update both JSX structure and CSS

Please provide a detailed implementation plan for modifying SidebarOpinions.jsx and sidebarOpinions.css to achieve this redesign.

content.text: I'll explore the codebase to understand both components thoroughly before creating the plan.
Now let me read the CSS file to understand the current styles and the OpinionViewer styles.
Now let me check the CSS variables defined in index.css.
